sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Define JPA Entities & Repositories: Create User.java entity with @Entity, @Table(name='users'), fields id, email, passwordHash, provider, role, @OneToMany for Center ownership, implement equals/hashCode based on id
Coder Agent: Define JPA Entities & Repositories: Create Center.java entity with @Entity, fields id, name, address, taxId, contactPhone, adminId (@ManyToOne to User), @OneToMany to Course list
Coder Agent: Define JPA Entities & Repositories: Create UserRepository.java extending JpaRepository<User, Long> with findByEmail and findByRole methods

DevOps Agent: Initialize Quarkus Application & Basic Config: Configure application.properties with PostgreSQL datasource, Hibernate ddl-auto=none, JWT secret placeholder, Kafka bootstrap servers, OAuth client placeholders
DevOps Agent: Initialize Quarkus Application & Basic Config: Create multi-stage Dockerfile with Maven build stage, quarkus:2.15.0 runtime, port 8080 exposure, and /q/health endpoint
Tester Agent: Write Unit Tests for Entity Persistence: Create UserTest.java with @DataJpaTest for save/find operations, duplicate email constraint validation, role enum persistence verification
Tester Agent: Write Unit Tests for Entity Persistence: Create UserRepositoryTest.java testing findByEmail returns expected user and findByRole filters users by role

Coder Agent: Implement JWT Authentication Service: Create AuthService.java with generateToken method including sub, email, role, iat, exp claims, authenticateLocal with password verification, authenticateOAuth for provider lookup/creation

Coder Agent: Implement JWT Authentication Service: Create JwtTokenFilter.java extending ContainerRequestFilter to validate Authorization Bearer token header, extract claims, set SecurityContext with UserPrincipal and roles
Coder Agent: Create OAuth2 Success Handlers for External Providers: Implement OAuth2SuccessHandler.java mapping Firebase/Google/Facebook user info to User entity, generating JWT response

Tester Agent: Write Integration Tests for Auth Flows: Create AuthResourceTest.java with QuarkusTest + TestHTTPEndpoint testing POST /api/auth/login valid/invalid credentials, POST /api/auth/oauth/google mock response, JWT token verification

Reviewer Agent: Code Review of Authentication Layer: Review all security files and AuthService.java for BCrypt/Argon2 password hashing, token expiration logic, @RolesAllowed annotations, secure OAuth secret handling

Coder Agent: Implement Center Management REST Resources: Create CenterResource.java with GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints for /api/centers, @RolesAllowed('SYSTEM_ADMIN') enforcement, request DTO validation
Coder Agent: Implement Center Management REST Resources: Create CenterService.java with CRUD operations delegating to CenterRepository and assignAdmin method with role update
Coder Agent: Implement Course, Teacher, Student & Attendance Resources: Create CourseResource.java with CRUD endpoints and teacher assignment, role restrictions for ADMIN/MANAGER
Coder Agent: Implement Course, Teacher, Student & Attendance Resources: Create TeacherResource.java with CRUD operations and course viewing, role restrictions for ADMIN/MANAGER/TEACHER
Coder Agent: Implement Course, Teacher, Student & Attendance Resources: Create StudentResource.java with CRUD and course enrollment, role restrictions for ADMIN/MANAGER/STUDENT

Coder Agent: Implement Course, Teacher, Student & Attendance Resources: Create AttendanceResource.java with POST /api/attendance/qr accepting qrPayload, business logic for once-per-day recording, Kafka event emission
Coder Agent: Build Kafka Producer & Consumer Services: Create AttendanceEventProducer.java with KafkaProducer configuration and sendAttendanceEvent method with async send and callback logging

Coder Agent: Build Kafka Producer & Consumer Services: Create NotificationEventConsumer.java subscribing to notifications topic, invoking NotificationService.notifyZaloGroup and MobilePushService.sendPush
Tester Agent: Write Integration Tests for Core Resources: Create CenterResourceTest.java testing CRUD operations with role-based security and Kafka event emission verification

Tester Agent: Write Integration Tests for Core Resources: Create AttendanceResourceTest.java simulating QR payload, asserting attendance record creation, duplicate rejection, and Kafka producer invocation
DevOps Agent: Finalize Docker Image & Health Checks: Update Dockerfile with COPY target/membership-hub-backend.jar app.jar, runtime arguments, and HEALTHCHECK command for /q/health endpoint
DevOps Agent: Finalize Docker Image & Health Checks: Create docker-compose.yml with app, postgres, kafka services, network linking, and environment variables for DB, Kafka, JWT configuration

Reviewer Agent: Final Code Review & Sign-off: Review all source files from Days 1-3 for Java 17 coding standards, OpenAPI annotations, security annotations, Kafka event schema consistency, and Docker image optimization
